# Praveen MT - Character Sheet & Dossier

## Overview
Praveen MT (online alias: ReverseEngineeringDude) is a Computer Engineering student from Kerala, India, specializing in Cybersecurity, Reverse Engineering, App Development (Flutter), and Embedded Systems. 

## Mindset & Philosophy
"Engineering systems beyond the surface."
"Work in Silence, Let Success Make the Noise."

## Key Channels & Comms
- GitHub: https://github.com/ReverseEngineeringDude
- HackerOne: https://hackerone.com/ReverseEngineeringDude
- Bugcrowd: https://bugcrowd.com/ReverseEngineeringDude
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/redbytesec/
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/RedByteSec
- Telegram: https://t.me/ReverseEngineeringDude

## Core Arsenal
1. **Cybersecurity:** Reverse Engineering, Wireshark, Radare2, Bug Bounty Hunting
2. **App Development:** Flutter, Dart, Firebase
3. **Web Technologies:** Python, Django, JavaScript, Streamlit
4. **Hardware & AI:** ESP32, IoT Systems, AI Automation Workflows

## Current Directives
- B.Tech in Computer Engineering (2025 - 2027)
- Active Bug Bounty Hunting
- Building open-source tools and scripts on GitHub
